# zenutils-apidoc public API surface
# Generated by zenutils-apidoc from a `cargo test` snapshot test
# (regenerated on every `cargo test`; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# The features section is a DELTA: only lines added relative to the
# default-features section. Underscore-prefixed features are internal
# and excluded. Line counts are raw rustdoc item lines — see the
# summary block for the honest item taxonomy.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

## summary
#
# kind                                    default  +features
# lines total                                  19          0
#   pub modules                                 1          0
#   pub types (struct/enum/trait/alias)         1          0
#   free functions                              1          0
#   associated functions (methods)              7          0
#   impl lines (auto traits)                    7          0
#   impl lines (derived + manual)               2          0
#
# per-module pub lines (default + feature-additions):
#   (root)                       10 +0

## default features (19 lines)

pub mod zenutils_apidoc
pub struct zenutils_apidoc::ApiDoc
impl zenutils_apidoc::ApiDoc
pub fn zenutils_apidoc::ApiDoc::crates<I, S>(self, I) -> Self where I: core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator<Item = S>, S: core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>
pub fn zenutils_apidoc::ApiDoc::new() -> Self
pub fn zenutils_apidoc::ApiDoc::no_extra_section(self, &str) -> Self
pub fn zenutils_apidoc::ApiDoc::out_dir(self, &str) -> Self
pub fn zenutils_apidoc::ApiDoc::pinned_features(self, &str, &str) -> Self
pub fn zenutils_apidoc::ApiDoc::run(self)
impl core::default::Default for zenutils_apidoc::ApiDoc
pub fn zenutils_apidoc::ApiDoc::default() -> zenutils_apidoc::ApiDoc
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenutils_apidoc::ApiDoc
impl core::marker::Send for zenutils_apidoc::ApiDoc
impl core::marker::Sync for zenutils_apidoc::ApiDoc
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenutils_apidoc::ApiDoc
